stories.name: Info
stories.snippet: const Info = () => <Alert variant="info" title="Information">This is an informational alert for general notices.</Alert>;

stories.name: Success
stories.snippet: const Success = () => <Alert variant="success" title="Success">Action completed successfully.</Alert>;

stories.name: Warning
stories.snippet: const Warning = () => <Alert variant="warning" title="Warning">Please review your input.</Alert>;

stories.name: Error
stories.snippet: const Error = () => <Alert variant="error" title="Error">Something went wrong.</Alert>;

Basic
stories.snippet: const Basic = () => <Card title="Basic Card" subtitle="Subtitle text">Simple card with a title, subtitle and body text. Great for displaying content.</Card>;

stories.name: With Actions
stories.snippet:
const WithActions = () => <Card
    title="Action Card"
    subtitle="With buttons"
    actions={(<>
      <Button size="sm">Action</Button>
      <Button size="sm" variant="ghost">Cancel</Button>
    </>)}>Card with action buttons in the footer.</Card>;

stories.name: Checked Disabled
stories.snippet: const CheckedDisabled = () => <Checkbox label="Checked Disabled" defaultChecked disabled />;

stories.snippet: const CustomPlaceholder = () => <Dropdown options={options} placeholder="Choose a color..." />;
